# AEO Decoded

> AEO Decoded is a podcast by Gary Crossey, founder of Irishguy Design Studio
> (Asheville, NC). It documents, tests, and proves how websites earn citations
> from AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini. Seasons 1-2 cover
> AEO fundamentals; Season 3 is a public build log with measured results.
> AEO Decoded is an Irishguy Design Studio project.

## Key pages
- [Episodes](https://aeodecoded.ai/episodes/): full archive, Seasons 1-2
- [The Reset](https://aeodecoded.ai/the-reset/): why Season 3 restarted
- [About Gary Crossey](https://aeodecoded.ai/about/): host and studio founder

## Related
- [Irishguy Design Studio](https://www.irishguydesign.studio/): brand, web, and
  Answer Engine Optimization services — the studio behind this podcast
